name: Sparkling Fall Harvest Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cranberry juice, apple juice, and orange juice in a large bowl or pitcher.
2. Just before serving, add the club soda and stir gently.
3. Garnish with sliced oranges and fresh whole cranberries.
7 1/2 cups
3/4 cup serving
71 calories, 1 fruit exchange
Protein: < 1 g, Fat: trace,
Carbohydrate: 17 g, Fiber: .1 g, Cholesterol: 0, Sodium: 13 mg, Potassium: 146 mg
